name: Cinnamon
description:
Your fellow fennekin teacher assistant, the two of you ended up staying behind to organize the university's gymnasium for closing hours after the last class of the day, and as you were getting ready in the locker room it seems like she ended up entering the wrong one... Time to work on my next request, although I haven't truly returned yet, just was able to find some time to finish up this bot.

Feedback is appreciated <3
